originalTitle: Deltarune's New Trailer Might CONFIRM Woody Theory! | Deltarune: Woody Theory 3
content: The trailer for Deltarune Chapter 5 revealed all sorts of crazy things, including Asgore's Flower Kingdom, Kris Susie and Ralsei battling a Flower Knight, the return of OMEGA FLOWEY attacks, and more! But, while you might not realize it, many believe there's something else in this trailer - CONFIRMATION that Woody Theory was right all along. Let's do this one more time, partners - I'm discussing WOODY THEORY, all the evidence, all the clues, and how it might play out when Deltarune Chapter 5 releases in two weeks! chineseContent: Deltarune 第 5 章的预告片揭示了各种疯狂的事情，包括 Asgore 的花王国、Kris Susie 和 Ralsei 与花骑士的战斗、OMEGA FLOWEY 攻击的回归等等！但是，虽然您可能没有意识到，但许多人相信这个预告片中还有其他内容 - 确认伍迪理论一直都是正确的。让我们再做一次吧，伙伴们 - 我正在讨论伍迪理论、所有证据、所有线索，以及两周后 Deltarune 第 5 章发布时它可能会如何发挥作用！牛仔与武士：流派研究：https://www.hollywoodinsider.com/cowboys-and-samura-genre-analysis/ Deltarune：七武士理论 u/TRIPWALKER：https://www.reddit.com/r/Deltarune/comments/1u2ihbt/chapter_5_is_going_to_be_inspired_by_kurosawas/ #deltarunechapter3 #deltarunechapter2 #deltarune
